name: FourKites Real-Time Supply Chain Visibility API
what_it_does: FourKites REST API for real-time supply chain visibility platform. Enables AI agents to track shipment location and status across all modes (truckload, LTL, ocean, air, rail, parcel), handle predictive ETA and delay notification workflows, access yard management and dock scheduling data, retrieve ocean container and intermodal tracking, manage carrier and partner data sharing and collaboration, access supply chain analytics and network visibility data, handle exception management and alert automation, retrieve shipment event and milestone data, manage purchase order and ASN tracking, and integrate visibility data with TMS, WMS, and ERP systems.
use_cases: Tracking multi-modal shipments and ETAs from supply chain visibility agents
Managing yard scheduling and dock door automation from logistics operations agents
Retrieving ocean container tracking from import/export automation agents
Integrating visibility data with TMS and ERP from supply chain analytics agents
not_for: Single-carrier domestic shipping without multi-modal visibility needs
Parcel shipping without enterprise supply chain complexity
Small shippers without enterprise visibility platform investment
best_when: An enterprise shipper, retailer, or 3PL using FourKites wants AI agents to automate multi-modal shipment tracking, ETA prediction, exception alerting, yard management, and supply chain analytics.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated ETA and delivery updates are customer-facing — inaccurate predictions damage customer relationships. Yard management automation affects physical dock scheduling and labor. Carrier data sharing requires authorization agreements. Ocean container data depends on carrier API quality and port connectivity.

auth.notes: FourKites uses OAuth 2.0 and API keys for platform API. Shipper and partner-level credentials with tracking, visibility, and analytics scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for shipment event and exception notifications. AI-powered ETA prediction engine.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise visibility subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-shipment and per-user subscription; enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 2014. Unicorn valued at $2B+. Market leader for real-time supply chain visibility. 1,000+ enterprise customers. Tracks 2M+ shipments daily across 200+ countries. ML-powered ETA with 93%+ accuracy claim. Competes with project44 and Descartes for supply chain visibility.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; high-volume tracking endpoints throttled

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Customer-facing ETA predictions — inaccurate data can damage shipper-customer relationships
Carrier connectivity quality varies — GPS tracking accuracy depends on carrier telematics integration
No public MCP server — REST API with developer portal
Ocean container tracking latency — port-to-carrier data feeds can be 12-24 hours delayed
Yard management integration requires physical gate and dock infrastructure coordination
High-volume shipment event webhooks require robust consumer infrastructure for real-time processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supply chain shipment and location data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Carrier and shipper data sharing governance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Shipment tracking and supply chain data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Carrier network data sharing.
